title: social-auto-upload project summary document
description: A retrospective of a Trae-driven social media auto-upload project: architecture design, engineering governance, testing, and CI/CD practices. Accelerating application development using AI tools.
content: **TL;DR:** This is a multi-platform social media automated publishing system developed using the powerful AI programming tool Trae IDE.`social-auto-upload`This article provides a comprehensive overview of the project. The system supports one-click upload and publishing to platforms such as Douyin, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu. It delves into how AI can be used to achieve architecture refactoring, automated test-driven development, and CI/CD process standardization, showcasing the potential of AI to empower full-stack development. ## 1. Project Overview ## 1. Project Overview `social-auto-upload`It's a powerful automation tool designed to help content creators and operators efficiently publish video content to multiple mainstream domestic and international social media platforms with a single click. The project is based on Playwright Browser Automation (/posts/AntigravityChromeFix/) technology, enabling...`抖音`、`Bilibili`、`小红书`、`快手`、`视频号`、`百家号` as well as `TikTok`Features such as video uploading and scheduled publishing on platforms. ### 1.1 Technology Stack | Category | Technology | Version | |------|------|------| | Backend | Python | 3.10+ | | Backend Framework | Flask | - | | Frontend Framework | Vue 3 + Vite | - | | UI Component Library | Element Plus | - | | Browser Automation | Playwright | - | | Database | SQLite | - | | Scheduled Tasks | APScheduler | - | ### 1.2 Project Architecture The project adopts a frontend-backend separation architecture, mainly including the following core modules: - **Backend API**: Provides RESTful interfaces, handles business logic and platform uploads - **Frontend Web Interface**: Provides an intuitive user interface - **Platform Uploader**: Implements automated uploads for each social media platform - **Browser Automation**: Browser operation encapsulation based on Playwright - **Scheduled Tasks**: Implements scheduled video publishing functionality ## 2. Project Takeover and Initialization ### 2.1 Current Project Status Analysis Upon taking over the project, it already possessed a basic functional framework, but the following issues existed: - The project structure was unclear, and the code organization was relatively loose. - Lack of comprehensive unit and integration tests. - Lack of standardized engineering governance practices. - CI/CD processes had not yet been established. - Upload functionality on some platforms required optimization and fixing. ### 2.2 Project Initialization 1. **Code Cloning and Environment Setup** ```bash git clone https://github.com/dreammis/social-auto-upload.git cd social-auto-upload ```2. **Dependency Installation** - Using the Trae tool's terminal functionality, execute the following command to install all dependencies: ```bash npm run install:all python -m playwright install chromium firefox webkit ```3. **Project Structure Analysis** - Use Trae's file browsing function to view the project directory structure. - Analyze the code organization to identify core modules and functionalities. ## 3. Trae Tool Activation and Configuration ### 3.1 Trae Tool Activation 1. **IDE Integration** - Open the project directory in the Trae IDE. - The system automatically identifies the project type and activates the corresponding intelligent assistant. 2. **Model Selection** - Select a suitable AI model based on project requirements (primarily using Doubao_1.6). - Configure model call preferences to optimize code generation quality (compared to the purely conversational [GitHub Copilot](/posts/GithubCopilot/), it provides a different experience in terms of full project context awareness). ### 3.2 Trae Tool Configuration 1. **Editor Configuration** - Configure code auto-completion, syntax highlighting, etc. - Set code formatting rules to align with project specifications. 2. **Smart Assistant Configuration** - Enable real-time code suggestions. - Configure error detection and fix prompts. - Set a code refactoring suggestion switch. 3. **Project-Specific Configuration** - Import the project's copilot-instructions.md file to familiarize Trae with project specifications. - Configure shortcuts for frequently used commands to improve development efficiency. ## 4. Feature Development and Deployment ### 4.1 Backend Development #### 4.1.1 Database Management Optimization **Problem**: Database connections and management are fragmented, lacking a unified management mechanism. **Trae Tool Application**: - When using Trae's code refactoring features, it is recommended to centralize database management logic. - Generate a database manager class to uniformly handle database connections, path management, etc. **Implementation**: ```python # apps/backend/src/services/db_manager.py class DBManager: def __init__(self): self.db_path = self._get_db_path() self.conn = None def _get_db_path(self): # 统一管理数据库路径 return os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)), "../../db", "app.db") def connect(self): # 统一数据库连接逻辑 if not self.conn: self.conn = sqlite3.connect(self.db_path) return self.conn def close(self): # 统一数据库关闭逻辑 if self.conn: self.conn.close() self.conn = None ```**Benefits:** - Simplified database operations and improved code reusability - Facilitated unified management of database paths and supported different environment configurations - Reduced the risk of database connection leaks #### 4.1.2 Login Process Optimization **Problem:** Login processes across platforms are fragmented, lacking a unified verification mechanism. **Trae Tool Application:** - Used Trae's code generation function to create a unified login verification interface. - Optimized browser startup logic, improving login success rate. **Implementation:** ```python # apps/backend/src/services/login_service.py async def verify_login_status(page, platform): """统一验证登录状态""" # 基于不同平台实现登录验证逻辑 if platform == "douyin": return await verify_douyin_login(page) elif platform == "bilibili": return await verify_bilibili_login(page) # 其他平台... ```**Benefits:** - Unified login verification process, improving code maintainability. - Optimized browser parameter configuration, increasing login success rate. - Enhanced error handling and debugging information, facilitating problem localization. ### 4.2 Front-end Development #### 4.2.1 Enhanced Task Management Functionality **Problem:** The front-end task management interface is relatively simple, lacking status tracking and batch operation capabilities. **Trae Tool Application:** - Use Trae's component generation function to create task list and detail components. - Implement real-time task status updates and batch operation functionality. **Implementation:** ```vue ```**Benefits:** - Enhanced task management functionality, supporting batch operations. - Improved user experience, enabling real-time task status updates. - Unified UI design style, consistent with the Element Plus component library. #### 4.2.2 Account Management Function Optimization **Issue:** The account management interface lacks status tracking and quick switching functionality. **Trae Tool Application:** - Use Trae's code generation function to create an account management component. - Implemented account status monitoring and quick switching functionality. **Benefits:** - Enabled real-time account status monitoring, facilitating user understanding of account status. - Supported quick account switching, improving operational efficiency. - Enhanced account security management, supporting encrypted cookie storage. ### 4.3 Feature Deployment 1. **Testing and Verification:** - Use Trae's terminal function to run the test suite: ```bash npm test ```2. **Deployment and Launch** - After successful verification in the local development environment, deploy to the test server. - Perform regression testing to ensure all functions operate correctly. - Collect user feedback and continuously optimize the functionality. ## 5. Unit Test Implementation ### 5.1 Test Framework Setup **Problem**: The project lacks comprehensive unit tests, making it difficult to guarantee code quality. **Trae Tool Application**: - Use Trae's code generation function to create a test framework and basic test cases. - Configure test report generation and coverage statistics. **Implementation**: #### 5.1.1 Backend Testing 1. **Test Framework Configuration** - Use pytest as the test framework. - Configure the pytest.ini file to define test flags and execution rules. - Install test dependencies: pytest, pytest-cov, pytest-asyncio, etc. 2. **Test Case Generation** - Use Trae to generate login function test cases.```python # apps/backend/tests/test_login.py import pytest from services.login_service import verify_login_status @pytest.mark.asyncio @pytest.mark.login async def test_verify_login_status(): # 测试登录验证功能 # ... ```- Generate database operation test cases ```python # apps/backend/tests/test_db.py import pytest from services.db_manager import DBManager def test_db_connection(): # 测试数据库连接功能 db_manager = DBManager() conn = db_manager.connect() assert conn is not None db_manager.close() ```3. **Test Execution and Reporting** - Run tests using the terminal function of the Trae tool: ```bash npm run test:backend ```- Generate test reports and coverage reports, located in`apps/backend/test-results/`Table of Contents #### 5.1.2 Front-end Testing 1. **Test Framework Configuration** - Using Vitest as the testing framework - Configuring test report generation and coverage statistics - Installing test dependencies: vitest, @vue/test-utils, jsdom, etc. 2. **Test Case Generation** - Using Trae to generate component test cases ```javascript // apps/frontend/tests/components/TaskList.test.js import { mount } from '@vue/test-utils' import TaskList from '@/components/TaskList.vue' test('TaskList component renders correctly', () => { const wrapper = mount(TaskList) expect(wrapper.find('.card-header span').text()).toBe('任务列表') }) ```3. **Test Execution and Reporting** - Run tests using the terminal function of the Trae tool: ```bash npm run test:frontend ```- Generate test reports and coverage reports, located in`apps/frontend/test-results/`Table of Contents ### 5.2 Test Coverage Improvement With the help of the Trae tool, we gradually improved the project's test coverage: | Module | Initial Coverage | Final Coverage | Improvement Amount | |------|------------|------------|----------| | Backend Core Functionality | 30% | 75% | +45% | | Frontend Components | 25% | 68% | +43% | | Platform Uploader | 20% | 62% | +42% | **Benefits**: - Improved code quality and reduced potential bugs - Enhanced code maintainability and facilitated subsequent feature expansion - Provided reliable regression testing assurance and reduced version update risks ## 6. Project Governance Standardization ### 6.1 Code Standardization **Problem**: The project lacked a unified code standard, resulting in inconsistent coding styles among different developers. **Trae Tool Application**: - Use Trae's code analysis capabilities to check for code style issues in existing code. - Generate code style documentation tailored to the project's characteristics. **Implementation**: 1. **Backend Code Style Guide** - Follow PEP 8 coding standards - Configure flake8 and black tools for code inspection and formatting - Define specific rules for function naming, comment formatting, etc. 2. **Frontend Code Style Guide** - Follow Vue 3 best practices - Use ESLint and Prettier for code inspection and formatting - Define rules for component naming, props design, etc. 3. **Commit Style Guide** - Establish Git commit message standards, using semantic commit formatting - Example:`feat(login): enhance login functionality with debug tools`### 6.2 Project Structure Optimization **Problem**: The project structure is not clear enough, and the code organization is relatively loose. **Trae Tool Application**: - Use Trae's file management function to reorganize the project structure. - Optimize module division and improve code modularity. **Implementation**: 1. **Backend Structure Optimization** ``` apps/backend/src/ ├── db/ # 数据库相关文件 ├── routes/ # 后端路由 ├── services/ # 业务逻辑 ├── uploader/ # 各平台上传器实现 ├── utils/ # 后端工具函数 └── app.py # 后端API入口 ```2. **Front-end Structure Optimization** ``` apps/frontend/src/ ├── api/ # API调用 ├── assets/ # 静态资源 ├── components/ # 可复用组件 ├── composables/ # 组合式API逻辑 ├── router/ # 路由配置 ├── stores/ # Pinia状态管理 ├── styles/ # 样式文件 ├── utils/ # 前端工具函数 ├── views/ # 页面组件 ├── App.vue # 根组件 └── main.js # 前端入口文件 ``` **Benefits**: - Improved code maintainability and readability - Facilitates new developers' rapid familiarization with the project structure - Optimized inter-module dependencies and reduced coupling ### 6.3 Development Process Standardization **Problems**: Lack of standardized development processes, resulting in low collaboration efficiency **Trae Tool Application**: - Use Trae's documentation generation function to create development process standardization documents - Define rules for branch management, code review, and testing processes **Implementation**: 1. **Branch Management Strategy** - Main branch: main (production environment) - Development branch: develop (development environment) - Feature branch: feature/* (new feature development) - Fix branch: bugfix/* (bug fixes) 2. **Code Review Process** - All code changes must be approved via Pull Request - At least one reviewer approval is required - All automated tests must pass 3. **Test Process Standardization** - Unit tests: Written during development to ensure functional correctness - Integration tests: Verify inter-module collaboration - E2E Testing: Simulate user actions to verify the complete process **Benefits**: - Standardizes the development process and improves collaboration efficiency - Enhances code quality control and reduces online bugs - Facilitates project management and progress tracking ## 7. CI Process Configuration ### 7.1 CI Process Design **Problem**: The project has not yet established a [CI/CD process](/posts/ci-cd-best-practices/), making automated testing and deployment impossible. **Trae Tool Application**: - Use Trae's CI configuration generation function to create a GitHub Actions workflow - Configure automated testing, code inspection, and deployment processes **Implementation**: 1. **CI Workflow Configuration** - Create a .github/workflows/ci.yml file - Configure trigger conditions: push to the main or develop branch, or create a PR - Define workflow steps: install dependencies, code inspection, run tests, etc. 2. **Automated Testing** - Configure the backend test environment - Configure the frontend test environment - Generate and upload test reports 3. **Code Quality Inspection** - Configure flake8 and ESLint checks - Integrate Codecov for coverage statistics - Configure SonarQube for code quality analysis 4. **Deployment Process** - Configure automatic deployment for the test environment - Configure the production environment deployment process (manual triggering) - Integrate Docker build and push ### 7.2 CI Process Benefits 1. **Improved Development Efficiency** - Automated execution of tests and code checks, reducing manual operations - Quick feedback on code quality issues for timely fixing 2. **Enhanced Code Quality** - Ensure all code changes are tested and checked - Improve test coverage and reduce potential bugs 3. **Accelerated Release Process** - Automated deployment process, reducing deployment time - Reduce deployment risks and improve release reliability 4. **Easy Project Management** - Provide a visual view of the CI/CD process status - Facilitate tracking and management of project progress ## 8. Trae Tool Application Scenarios and Benefits ### 8.1 Code Generation **Application Scenarios**: - Generate new components and functional modules - Create test cases and test frameworks - Generate documentation and configuration files **Usage Method**: - Use Trae IDE's intelligent assistant to input natural language descriptions of requirements - The system automatically generates code that conforms to project specifications - Adjust and optimize as needed **Practical Benefits**: - Improved code generation efficiency and reduced repetitive work - Generated code conforms to project specifications, ensuring code quality - Lowered the barrier to entry for new feature development and accelerated the development process ### 8.2 Code Refactoring **Application Scenarios**: - Optimize existing code structure and performance - Unify code style and naming conventions - Fix potential problems in the code **Usage Method**: - Use Trae's code analysis function to identify refactoring opportunities - Apply refactoring suggestions provided by Trae - Verify the correctness of the refactored code **Practical Benefits**: - Improved code maintainability and readability - Optimized code performance and improved system operating efficiency - Reduced potential bugs in the code, improving system stability ### 8.3 Error Detection and Repair **Application Scenarios**: - Detecting syntax errors and logical problems in the code - Providing error repair suggestions - Optimizing code quality **Usage**: - Trae tool detects errors in the code in real time - View error details and repair suggestions - Apply repair suggestions and verify the repair effect **Practical Benefits**: - Reduced debugging time and improved development efficiency - Improved code quality and reduced online bugs - Helps developers learn and master best practices ### 8.4 Intelligent Suggestion and Completion **Application Scenarios**: - Intelligent suggestions during code writing - Function and method parameter completion - API call examples and documentation **Usage**: - Trae tool automatically provides intelligent suggestions while writing code - Select appropriate suggestions to speed up code writing - View relevant documentation and examples to deepen understanding **Practical Benefits**: - Improved code writing efficiency and reduced input errors - Helps developers quickly master the use of APIs and libraries - Reduced time spent consulting documentation, increased developer focus ### 8.5 Test Generation and Execution **Application Scenarios**: - Generate unit test and integration test cases - Configure test environment and runtime parameters - Analyze test results and coverage **Usage Methods**: - Use Trae tool to generate test case templates - Improve test cases according to functional requirements - Run tests and analyze results **Practical Benefits**: - Improved test coverage and ensured code quality - Reduced test writing time and improved testing efficiency - Facilitates the discovery and fixing of potential problems ## 9. Project Outcomes and Benefits ### 8.1 Functional Outcomes 1. **Core Function Optimization** - Optimized upload processes on various platforms, improving upload success rate - Enhanced login functionality, improving login stability - Implemented real-time task status tracking and management 2. **User Experience Improvement** - Optimized the web interface, providing an intuitive operating experience - Enhanced task management functionality, supporting batch operations - Implemented real-time account status monitoring 3. **Enhanced Scalability** - Optimized platform uploader architecture for easier addition of new platforms - Provided a unified API interface for easy integration with other systems - Supports Docker deployment for easy operation in different environments ### 8.2 Technical Achievements 1. **Improved Code Quality** - Test coverage increased from 30% to over 70% - Unified code standards improved maintainability - Refactored core modules and optimized code structure 2. **Standardized Project Governance** - Established unified code standards and development processes - Implemented automated testing and CI/CD processes - Improved project scalability and maintainability 3. **Improved Development Efficiency** - Accelerated development process using Trae tools - Automated testing and deployment reduced manual operations - Standardized processes improved collaboration efficiency ### 8.3 Business Benefits 1. **Improved Content Publishing Efficiency** - Enabled one-click publishing to multiple platforms, reducing repetitive work - Supported scheduled publishing, improving the flexibility of content operations - Batch operation functionality improved the efficiency of large-scale content publishing 2. **Reduced Operating Costs** - Reduced manual operation time and lower labor costs - Increased release success rate and reduced retry costs - Easier management of multiple accounts, reducing account management costs 3. **Enhanced Business Scalability** - Supports rapid addition of new platforms to adapt to business development needs - Provides API interfaces for easy integration with other systems - Supports Docker deployment for easy operation in different environments ## 10. Experience Summary and Best Practices ### 9.1 Trae Tool Usage Experience 1. **Appropriate Model Selection** - Select appropriate AI models based on different tasks - For code generation, choose models better at programming - For document generation, choose models better at natural language processing 2. **Clear Requirements Description** - Provide clear and specific requirements descriptions - Include contextual information for AI understanding - Gradually refine requirements to improve generation quality 3. **Combined with Human Review** - Perform human review of generated code - Verify logical correctness and security - Adjust according to project specifications 4. **Continuous Learning and Optimization** - Summarizing Trae Tool Usage Experience - Optimize prompts and usage methods - Share best practices to improve team efficiency ### 9.2 Project Management Best Practices 1. **Prioritize Code Quality** - Establish a comprehensive testing system - Implement a code review system - Use automated tools for code quality checks 2. **Standardized Engineering Governance** - Develop clear code standards and development processes - Use tools to ensure standards are followed - Regularly conduct code quality assessments and improvements 3. **Automated Testing and CI/CD** - Establish an automated testing system - Implement CI/CD processes to improve development efficiency - Continuously optimize test coverage and CI processes 4. **Modularization and Scalability** - Adopt modular design to improve code reusability - Design clear API interfaces for easy expansion - Consider future needs and reserve expansion space ### 9.3 Future Improvement Directions 1. **Feature Enhancement** - Support more social media platforms - Implement smarter automated upload scheduling strategies - 1. **Enhanced Video Auto-Editing and Cover Generation Functionality** 2. **Performance Optimization** - Optimized browser automation performance, improving upload speed. - Implemented multi-threaded/asynchronous uploads, improving concurrent processing capabilities. - Optimized database queries, improving system response speed. 3. **User Experience Enhancement** - Optimized web interface design, providing a more intuitive operating experience. - Implemented richer data analysis and reporting functions. - Enhanced system configurability to adapt to different user needs. 4. **Technology Stack Upgrade** - Consider upgrading the backend framework, such as migrating from Flask to FastAPI. - Optimized the frontend architecture, improving component reusability. - Consider introducing a microservice architecture to improve system scalability. ## 11. Summary Through the use of Trae, we successfully completed the optimization and upgrade of the social-auto-upload project. From project takeover, Trae activation and configuration, feature development and deployment, unit testing implementation, standardized engineering governance, to CI process configuration, Trae played a crucial role at each stage, improving development efficiency, ensuring code quality, and accelerating project progress. The successful implementation of the project not only optimized existing functions and improved system performance and stability, but also established a standardized engineering governance system and CI/CD process, laying a solid foundation for subsequent continuous iteration and expansion. By summarizing the experience and best practices during the project implementation process, we can provide a valuable reference for similar projects, improve development efficiency, ensure project quality, and achieve better business results.
